---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# nla

<!-- badges: start -->
[![R-CMD-check](https://github.com/fwimp/nla/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/fwimp/nla/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml)
<!-- badges: end -->

NLA provides a simple set of functions to aid in performing non-linear averaging.

$$
\overline{f(X)} \neq f(\overline{X})
$$

## Installation

You can install the development version of `nla` from [GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("fwimp/nla")
```
